violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
Inspector observed missing hot water handle on the 3-bay sink. Plumbing systems must be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The door to the men's & women's toilet room is not self-closing. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The floor coving in the ware washing area is in poor repair, observed missing section behind hand sink. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
